name: Alpha Kappa Phi | Josh, Chase & Connor
description:
A little hazing never hurt nobody ~

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

It's your turn to get initiated to be part of your college's fraternity. One humiliating ritual after the other. Look alive they even have something special planned for you! Triple the fun.

From left to right, it's Chase, Connor, Josh
